models.name: Transaction & Account Base Model
models.description: Standardised banking data model for transactions, accounts, customers, KYC, sessions, and fraud investigations.

models.name: Fraud Event Sequence Model
models.description: Event-oriented extension for detecting account takeover fraud through chronological event chains.

models.name: Regulatory Dependency Mapping
models.description: Maps regulatory dependencies between standards and sections.

models.name: Mutual Fund Dependency Analytics
models.description: Analyses investment dependencies between funds and underlying stocks.

models.name: Deposit Analysis
models.description: Models customer deposit behaviour using the transaction base model pattern.

models.name: Account Takeover Fraud
models.description: Detects ATO fraud using the transaction base model with event-based fraud detection. References the Fraud Event Sequence Data Model.

models.name: Automated Facial Recognition
models.description: Facial biometric matching using vector embeddings on Face nodes. Uses cosine similarity for identity verification.

models.name: Synthetic Identity Fraud
models.description: Detects synthetic identities via shared PII (email, phone, passport) between customers. Uses LINKED relationships for GDS community detection.

models.name: Transaction Fraud Ring
models.description: Detects circular transaction flows between accounts. Uses Account and Transaction nodes with PERFORMS/BENEFITS_TO ring pattern.

models.name: Transaction Monitoring
models.description: AML transaction monitoring linking accounts, transactions, counterparties and jurisdictions.

models.name: Transaction Fraud Detection (IEEE-CIS)
models.description: Graph-based fraud detection with Transaction, Card, Device, Email, Address, Identity nodes for ML feature engineering.

models.name: Insurance Claims Fraud
models.description: Detects claims fraud via Claimant, Claim, MedicalProfessional, Vehicle connections.

models.name: Insurance Quote Fraud
models.description: Detects quote manipulation via linked list of Quote nodes tracking sequential changes with time deltas.

models.name: Patient Journey
models.description: Tracks patient healthcare journeys through encounters, observations, diagnoses, prescriptions, and providers.

models.name: Patent Intelligence
models.description: Maps pharmaceutical patent landscapes with owners, targets, diseases and drug classes.

models.name: Publication Intelligence
models.description: Analyses scientific publication networks with papers, authors, institutions, journals and topics.

models.name: Single-omics Data Integration
models.description: Integrates single-omics data with genes, proteins, pathways and diseases.

models.name: Multi-omics Data Integration
models.description: Integrates multiple omics layers (genomics, transcriptomics, proteomics, metabolomics) into a unified graph.

models.name: Electric Vehicle Route Planning
models.description: Models road networks with cities, charging stations and EVs for energy-aware route optimization using Cypher 25 stateful path finding.

models.name: Configurable Bill of Materials
models.description: Models configurable product structures with config groups, parts and variant resolution.

models.name: Engineering Traceability
models.description: Traces customer requests through requirements, designs and test cases for full lifecycle traceability.

models.name: Process Monitoring & Critical Path Analysis
models.description: Models manufacturing processes with machines, jobs, dependencies and queue management for CPA.

models.name: Vulnerability Prioritization & Exposure Management
models.description: VPEM model connecting code to cloud: compute instances, applications, libraries/SBOMs, CVEs, IAM policies and cloud services for risk-based prioritization.

models.name: Attack Path Analysis
models.description: Extends the VPEM model with CAN_REACH for lateral movement simulation. Maps kill chains from initial foothold to crown jewel assets.

models.name: Software Supply Chain Security (SBOM)
models.description: Models software bill of materials connecting applications to libraries, vulnerabilities, and the CISA KEV catalog for supply chain risk analysis.
